inputs.prompt: Professional news broadcast studio. An orange tabby cat wearing a tailored navy blue business suit with a red tie, sitting upright behind a news anchor desk, dead-eyed stare into camera, visibly unsettled. Behind him a large screen shows a split image: on the left a SpongeBob meme captioned FREEDOM INCOMING, on the right satellite imagery of smoke plumes. Lower-third chyron banner reads: GOVERNMENT POSTS SPONGEBOB WHILE GAS HITS $6. The cats ears are flat back, genuinely disturbed. Desk has papers, coffee mug, glass of water. Studio lighting is professional broadcast blue and warm key light. Photorealistic, cinematic, 4K.
